settings.name: Random Low
settings.description: Random stratified 10% / 10% / 80% train, validation, and test split. Training and evaluation use the full graph in the transductive setting.

settings.name: Random High
settings.description: Random stratified 50% / 25% / 25% train, validation, and test split. Training and evaluation use the full graph in the transductive setting.

settings.name: Temporal High
settings.description: Temporal 50% / 25% / 25% train, validation, and test split. Training and evaluation use the full graph in the transductive setting.

settings.name: Temporal High, inductive
settings.description: The TH temporal split with inductive information access: training sees the subgraph induced by train nodes, validation sees the subgraph induced by train and validation nodes, and test uses the full graph. Validation and test nodes are unseen during training; test nodes are unseen during validation.
